prompt:
A compost monitoring notebook page showing a simple hand-drawn temperature trend line and tick marks, with a long stainless probe thermometer lying across the bottom edge. A bucket compost lid and a small tray of dark compost are in soft focus; all handwritten notes are intentionally illegible.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future sustainable DIY aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean tools, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Center the notebook and probe so the “temperature log” reads instantly.
